economic_notes: WIFN Development LP consolidated as government partnership with 15% interest in two wind energy partnerships. Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation net investment $9,909,424. Tahgahoning Enterprises Inc. leases 3,749 acres of land annually until June 2029. Bkejwanong Gas & Convenience Incorporated closed September 2023 subsequent to year-end. Settlement Trust (Bkejwanong Trust) established from $28M land settlement with $7M transferred in 2016, total assets $9.2M at Dec 31, 2022.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two grounds: (1) GBE financial statements for Bkejwanong Gas & Convenience Incorporated and Walpole Algonac Ferry Ltd not finalized, so equity adjustments may be required; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations adopted April 1, 2022 but asbestos removal obligation not yet quantified. Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Bkejwanong Gas & Convenience Inc, Three Fires Development Corporation, Tahgahoning Enterprises Inc, Walpole Algonac Ferry Ltd, 1000440570 Ontario Ltd. WIFN Development LP and its eight sub-entities fully consolidated. No formal budget was prepared for the year. Health and Social expenses ($16,673,353) include both health and social assistance combined per segment reporting. Social assistance benefits alone were $5,347,940 per expenditure by object. ISC funding calculated as sum of fixed ($19,130,085) + flexible ($1,917,010) + grant ($879,889) + set contribution ($618,931) = $22,545,915. Total government transfers include ISC + Province of Ontario + Health Canada + HRDC + CMHC + Other federal = $22,545,915 + $11,617,745 + $3,851,614 + $1,300,842 + $67,580 + $149,748 = $38,802,754 (excluding Independent First Nations $291,375 and Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership $1,782,307 which are treated as investment/partnership income). Prior year expenses in statement of operations show $44,935,323 but schedule total shows $44,934,503 — minor reclassification difference.
